pi_items.source: AirNav.com, FAA official airport database; Wikipedia; multiple aviation reference sources confirm Sacramento Executive Airport has ICAO code KSAC
AirNav.com, Wikipedia, FAA database; multiple sources confirm official name is 'Sacramento Executive Airport'; task metadata uses shortened but accurate form
AirNav.com (FAA Identifier: SAC); web search result explicitly states 'FAA LID SAC'; SAC is the official FAA Location Identifier for Sacramento Executive Airport

AirNav.com, FAA official airport database; Wikipedia; multiple sources confirm Sacramento International Airport has ICAO code KSMF (located ~10.5 miles northwest of downtown Sacramento, different from Sacramento Executive)
Google Play Store, F-Droid, GitHub (apps4av/avare), official Avare website; all authoritative sources confirm package name is com.ds.avare; app is open source and available on multiple platforms

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real FAA/ICAO airport data. Sacramento Executive Airport is correctly identified with ICAO code KSAC, FAA Location Identifier SAC, and full official name 'Sacramento Executive Airport'. The distracter airport Sacramento International is correctly identified with ICAO code KSMF. The Avare aviation GPS app is correctly identified with package name com.ds.avare. All metadata values reference real, authoritative aviation data sources from the FAA and industry databases.
